description_long: This is a rectangular, industrial-style filing cabinet with a dark, weathered metal exterior. The cabinet features a boxy shape with reinforced edges and two prominent horizontal handles, one on each end, suggesting drawers or compartments. The surface is marked by visible wear and patina, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for heavy-duty environments. The top of the cabinet is flat with two raised bands running lengthwise, likely for structural support or stacking. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms on the exterior, and the overall design is minimalistic and robust. This object is likely intended for secure storage of documents or tools in urban or industrial settings.
description: A dark, weathered metal filing cabinet with a boxy shape, reinforced edges, and two horizontal handles. Its rugged, utilitarian design is suitable for industrial or urban storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing a flat face with a single horizontal handle centered on the panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, flat surface with two raised bands on the top and no visible handles.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a single horizontal handle centered on the panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a plain surface with raised bands on the top.
